rationale: The cited paper is topically related: it examines incumbent reactions and sales outcomes after competitive entry (Wal-Mart), while the citing paper studies competitive effects of NB/PL introductions on shares and category sales in grocery retail. This overlap makes a substantive conceptual/background role plausible, but the evidence here is only a DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context or described methodological borrowing. Given the sparse linkage evidence, it is not safe to drop, but not strong enough to clearly keep.
